_comment: ADO Work Item Template — GHAzDO Security Alert. Import via ADO REST API or recreate manually via Boards > Templates.
name: GHAzDO Security Alert
description: Template for creating work items from GHAzDO Advanced Security alerts (secret scanning, code scanning, dependency alerts)

fields.System.Description:
🔒 GHAzDO Security Alert

Alert Details

Alert Type:[Secret Scanning / Code Scanning / Dependency]
Repository:[repo name]
Alert Severity:[Critical / High / Medium / Low]
Alert URL:[paste link from GHAzDO]
File/Location:[affected file path]
Date Detected:[date]

Remediation Steps

  1. Review the alert in GHAzDO Advanced Security
  2. Determine if the finding is a true positive or false positive
  3. If true positive: implement the fix
  4. If false positive: dismiss the alert with justification
  5. Verify the alert is resolved in GHAzDO
  6. Close this work item

Acceptance Criteria

  • [ ] Alert reviewed and triaged
  • [ ] Fix implemented OR false positive documented
  • [ ] GHAzDO alert status is Closed or Dismissed
  • [ ] No regression introduced
fields.Microsoft.VSTS.TCM.ReproSteps:
1. Navigate to ADO → Repos → Advanced Security
  2. Locate the alert referenced in this work item
  3. Follow the remediation guidance provided by GHAzDO
  4. Verify the fix resolves the alert

_usage.manual_creation: Boards → Board Settings → Templates → + New template → paste these field values
_usage.api_body_note: The API expects a slightly different format: { 'fields': { ... }, 'name': '...', 'workItemTypeName': '...' }

_customization_notes.area_path: Replace {Project}\Security with your actual project and area path
_customization_notes.iteration_path: Replace with your current sprint/iteration path
_customization_notes.assigned_to: Optionally add 'System.AssignedTo' field with your security lead's email
